@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: minimal_behavior_change ∧ same_validation_order ∧ single_next_err_path
P: promisify(db.findUser) → promisify(audit.log) → promisify(cache.set)
V: user_should_be_found ∧ error_should_be_logged_correctly ∧ cache_should_set_user
R: ! missing_id_error_handling ∧ ! not_found_error_handling ∧ ! audit_logging_failure ∧ ! cache_failure
A: Refactored_code_to_use_async/await_while_preserving_behavior

[AUDIT]
Ensure errors are appropriately handled in a single path.

structured_data.audit: Ensure errors are appropriately handled in a single path.
